positive: Minimalist graphic illustration of a friendly, stylized cosmic sloth hanging from a crescent moon. The sloth is rendered in clean, bold linework with high contrast and complementary color blocking (deep indigo, mustard yellow, and matte teal). Incorporate celestial elements like distant nebulae represented by soft gradients and small, stylized constellations forming an abstract background pattern. The composition should be central, perfectly balanced, and designed for a seamless, repeating print aesthetic. Flat graphic style, vector illustration quality, strong silhouettes, crisp edges, rule of thirds composition, studio lighting, highly detailed print artwork, suitable for t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, artifact, noisy, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, gradient fade, bad anatomy, extra limbs, complex shading, photorealism, 3D render, bokeh
